headline: Booking Holdings Inc. (BKNG): D. E. Shaw Is Buying This Travel Stock
summary: Booking Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:BKNG) features on the D. E. Shaw Stock Portfolio: Top 10 Stocks to Buy. Booking Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:BKNG) represents another long-term bet by D. E. Shaw. headline: Kurt Sievers, Retired CEO of NXP Semiconductors, Appointed to Booking Holdings Board of Directors
summary: Booking Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: BKNG) announced that its Board of Directors has appointed Kurt Sievers, former Chief Executive Officer of NXP Semiconductors, to the Board effective today.

headline: 2 Internet Stocks Worth Investigating and 1 We Turn Down
summary: Whether it be online shopping or social media, secular forces are propelling consumer internet businesses forward. But it’s not all sunshine and rainbows as consumer purchasing power can make or break demand. Unfortunately, the market seems to believe stormy skies are ahead as the industry has shed 29.8% over the past six months. This drawdown was noticeably worse than the S&P 500’s 5.5% fall.

headline: Assessing Booking Holdings (BKNG) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent share performance and business snapshot Booking Holdings (BKNG) has drawn investor attention after a period of weaker share performance, with the stock showing a roughly 21% decline year to date and about a 9% decline over the past year. In this context, the company reports annual revenue of US$26.9b and net income of US$5.4b from its global online travel and restaurant reservation platforms, largely driven by its Booking.com business headquartered in the Netherlands. See our latest...

headline: Cherry Blossom Demand Highlights Booking Holdings Valuation And Asia Travel Potential
summary: Agoda, part of Booking Holdings, reports a strong rise in global interest for trips to Japan during the cherry blossom season. The data points to heavy last minute booking activity as travelers target culturally focused itineraries around the 2026 sakura period. The trend highlights demand patterns that could be relevant for Booking Holdings, ticker NasdaqGS:BKNG, especially across the Asia Pacific region. For Booking Holdings, NasdaqGS:BKNG, this kind of seasonal demand is closely tied to...
